description: Repro of a production incident: a migration adds a column filtered by a hot query but no index, causing a table scan under load. The data-migrations lens must catch it and block.

evidence_trace: src/models/order.ts filters `WHERE status = ?` on a table with millions of rows
no CREATE INDEX accompanies the column, so the query degrades to a full table scan
finding.model_authored_prose: This migration adds `status` but no index, yet `order.ts` filters on it — add an index for `status` or the hot query will table-scan under load.
finding.suggested_patch: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_status ON orders (status);
